message:
chore(deps): refresh Cargo.lock — bump beads_rust 0.1.44→0.1.45, downgrade prost-derive inner itertools 0.14→0.13

Picked up by `cargo update` / local build: upstream beads_rust bumped its
patch version, and transitive prost-derive's `itertools` dep resolved back
to 0.13.0 (version selection shift from another crate upgrade in the
graph). No source changes; lockfile-only refresh to keep the workspace
reproducible build tracked with the rest of the repo.

files.patch:
@@ -456,7 +456,7 @@ checksum = "2af50177e190e07a26ab74f8b1efbfe2ef87da2116221318cb1c2e82baf7de06"
 
 [[package]]
 name = "beads_rust"
-version = "0.1.44"
+version = "0.1.45"
 dependencies = [
  "anyhow",
  "chrono",
@@ -6061,7 +6061,7 @@ source = "registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"
 checksum = "8a56d757972c98b346a9b766e3f02746cde6dd1cd1d1d563472929fdd74bec4d"
 dependencies = [
  "anyhow",
- "itertools 0.14.0",
+ "itertools 0.13.0",
  "proc-macro2",
  "quote",
  "syn",
